raw_consumer_statement:
I have been workong wit Citibank for the last 6 months trying to correct illegimate charges on my account by a contractor who was doing work in my home. 

Citi has credited me for 3 of the 4 fraudulent charges ; ( XX/XX/year> {$480.00} ; XX/XX/year> {$870.00}, XX/XX/year> {$270.00} ) but has not and will not credit my account for the XX/XX/year> charge of {$740.00}. They will not explain to me why. All of these illegitimate charges were made in the same billing cycle by the same vendor ( XXXX XXXX  ). I have completed all requested information from Citi on this charge, including a signed statement ( Citi Case # XXXX ) ] I am requesting {$740.00} account credit ( plus interest ) for this fraudulent charge for which I have received no goods nor services. 

[ see attached Citi_LetterXXXX  for full details ]
